name: @beamhop/acp-p2p-server
description: Host an ACP coding-agent session over a trystero WebRTC room. One peer hosts the agent; multiple peers join and observe. Strategy-agnostic — bring your own joinRoom.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-server' --external '@trystero-p2p/core' && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-server' --external '@trystero-p2p/core' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
